text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! You guys tracked me down just to wish
me happy birthday?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're the best! With all the birthday wishes I've
gotten, maybe I'll grow even bigger.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Must be nice. I wish I wasn't taking so long to be
all grown-up like you are!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Same here! If I could be like you, that would be
super marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, did you know there's a super food
that'll make you grow just like that?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's yummy, makes you happy, and leaves your
mind and body feeling warm all over! And this
incredible dish is called...
